metadata.title: Is A HAT WORTH MORE THAN A MAN?

pages.raw_text:
maker of hats in Danbury, Conn, whose hats were
boycotted by labor union, has decision from the
supreme court permitting him to the union and its
members for three times the amount of the loss they
caused him.


This is under the Sherman antitrust law which was
passed to worry the trust octopus. Perhaps the lawmak
imagined that it would swing around and hit
labor union and then again perhaps the trust lawyers in
the lobby and committee knew how the thing would
work.


The supreme court justices, however, rare legal
dentists Sometimes law is brought to them which has
teeth at all and they fit it out with fine set Of false
teeth, while another law, which has double set of teeth
all round with tusks at each corner gets most of them
nicely pulled


In this the sacred hat trade had been attacked and
the lower courts decided that the law could not protect it.
The supreme court at once however, that hats form
ed of the pillars of society," and their protection
imperative.


Another that of an engineer discharged by
railroad because he a union The Erdman law
provided that the railroad company could be fined for
doing this 1t fined by lower court but the supreme
court pulled all the teeth out of this law in short order
union man is merely human being, and not hat, and
the corporations may discharge him and blacklist him and
boycott hat You can blacklist a man, but you can't
blacklist hat.


When you put your derby hat made in Danbury,
Conn., handle gently because it is holy emblem of the
rights of property The rights of hats, according to the
courts higher than the rights of man. There has
been such significant verdict since the bred Scott de-
cision, which declared that human being, when he
black, was as much property walking stick That
decision caused the civil


This decision should not war, but it should
bring about revolution in constitutional methods
The constitution has not been amended for more than 80
years and it should be amended If congress is not
to be put above the court the people should be put above
the court and should be able decide constitutional CUES
lions finally by referendum vote
